channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-03-12)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-03-12.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Gooey Audio|Get 90% off Gooey’s Mortamer lo-fi effects plugin. $4.99 (reg. $49.99)
[HOT] Solid State Logic|Get 60% off SSL Blitzer by Solid State Logic. The discounted price is $39.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 60% - Desarrollador: Solid State Logic - Finaliza: 2026-03-23

item.title: [SAVE BIG] [HOT] iZotope|Get 85% off VocalSynth 2 by iZotope. The discounted price is $29.?NEW
[HOT] iZotope|Get 47% off FXEQ by iZotope. The discounted price is $29.?NEW
[HOT] iZotope|Get 70% off Trash by iZotope. The discounted price is $29.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Lucid Musician|Lucid Musician has released LucidHarmony v1.2.0 AI harmony generator plugin for Mac & Win. The plugin is available as a PWYW including free download.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Lucid Musician - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] ?pica Audio|Epica Audio has released Master Tape one-knob tape saturation plugin for Mac & Win. Master Tape is available for free.?NEW
